subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! Thy letter hath reached Me, bearing witness to thy humility and lowliness, thy rising up and thy sitting down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه قد اسمعنی کتابک ما دل علی خضوعک و خشوعک و قیامک و قعودک
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
